top_strength: Thorough multi-stop probe — correctly identified the three-location move, floor levels, elevator access logistics, and proactively suggested reordering stops.
coaching_note: The three differentiators (No Worries Damage Coverage, Meet Your Mover, On-Time Guarantee) were completely absent.
phone_presence_notes: Warm and helpful throughout but the call stayed transactional with no rapport-building moments.
